channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [ORGANICREC] ORSL Expands into CBAM Advisory via Strategic Partnership
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Organic Recycling Systems Ltd (ORSL) has partnered with General Carbon Advisory Services to enhance its sustainability service offerings, focusing on Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) advisory and compliance. This collaboration will leverage ORSL's market presence and General Carbon Advisory Services' technical expertise to support industries in CBAM preparedness, carbon reporting, and emissions data management. The initiative aims to help Indian manufacturers, particularly in sectors like steel and chemicals, navigate global carbon regulations and build long-term competitiveness.

  • ORSL partners with General Carbon Advisory Services for CBAM advisory.
  • The collaboration aims to support industries in carbon reporting and compliance.
  • ORSL will leverage its market presence, while General Carbon provides technical expertise.
  • The initiative targets sectors like steel, aluminum, and chemicals facing CBAM pressures.
  • The partnership seeks to turn regulatory pressure into strategic advantages for companies.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Organic Recycling Systems Ltd | Category: Partnership

item.title: [ALTIUSINVIT] Altius Telecom Infra Trust Announces Investor Call on May 12, 2026
item.description:
Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust has scheduled an Investor Call on May 12, 2026, at 04:00 p.m. (IST) to share updates on the Trust's performance and highlights for FY 2025-26. The call will be presented by Mr. Munish Seth, Mr. Rahul Katiyar, and Mr. Anshul Nagpal. Access information and registration details are available on the Trust's website. A transcript of the investor call will be available on May 14, 2026.

  • Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust to hold Investor Call on May 12, 2026.
  • The call will cover the Trust's performance and FY 2025-26 highlights.
  • Registration and webcast links are available on the company website.
  • Investor Call transcript will be released on May 14, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Altius Telecom Infrastructure Trust | Category: Business Update

item.title: [COFORGE] Coforge: Cigniti Technologies Amalgamation Effective
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Coforge Ltd. announced that the scheme of amalgamation of Cigniti Technologies Limited with Coforge has become effective. The certified copy of the NCLT Order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Haryana. All conditions specified in Clause 28 of the Scheme have been complied with, leading to the dissolution of Cigniti Technologies without being wound up. The appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025. The Board of Directors will consider and fix the record date on May 5, 2026, for determining shareholders of Cigniti Technologies for share cancellation and issuance of new Coforge shares as per the swap ratio.

  • Cigniti Technologies amalgamated with Coforge; scheme effective.
  • NCLT Order filed with Registrar of Companies, Haryana.
  • Appointed date for the scheme is April 1, 2025.
  • Board to fix record date on May 5, 2026, for share issuance.
  • Cigniti Technologies dissolved without being wound up.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Coforge Ltd | Category: Merger

item.title: [CIGNITI] Cigniti Technologies Amalgamation with Coforge Effective
item.description:
Cigniti Technologies Ltd. announced that the scheme of amalgamation with Coforge Limited is now effective. The certified copy of the NCLT Order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Haryana, fulfilling all scheme conditions. Consequently, Cigniti Technologies stands amalgamated with Coforge and is dissolved without being wound up, with an appointed date of April 1, 2025. The Board meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026, to consider Cigniti's financial results is cancelled, as these results will be included in Coforge's standalone financial results. Coforge's board will consider fixing the record date for determining shareholders whose shares will be cancelled and new shares issued per the scheme's swap ratio.

  • Cigniti Technologies amalgamated with Coforge Limited, effective immediately.
  • All conditions of the amalgamation scheme are now fulfilled.
  • Cigniti's financial results will be subsumed into Coforge's results.
  • Board meeting to consider Cigniti's financial results is cancelled.
  • Coforge to fix record date for share cancellation and issuance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIGNITI TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [CIGNITI] Cigniti Technologies Merger with Coforge Effective
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Cigniti Technologies Ltd. and Coforge Limited have completed the merger process following the sanction by the National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT), Chandigarh Bench. The certified copy of the NCLT Order has been filed with the Registrar of Companies, Haryana, fulfilling all conditions specified in the Scheme. Consequently, Cigniti Technologies is now amalgamated with Coforge and dissolved without being wound up, effective from the appointed date of April 1, 2025. The Board meeting scheduled for May 5, 2026, to consider Cigniti's financial results is cancelled, with these results to be included in Coforge's standalone financial results. Coforge's Board will meet on May 5, 2026, to fix the record date for determining shareholders whose shares will be cancelled and new Coforge shares issued per the Scheme's swap ratio.

  • Cigniti Technologies merged with Coforge Limited, effective April 1, 2025.
  • NCLT order filed with Registrar of Companies, Haryana, completing merger conditions.
  • Cigniti's Board meeting for financial results is cancelled.
  • Cigniti's financial results will be included in Coforge's standalone results.
  • Coforge's Board to fix record date for share cancellation and issuance.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CIGNITI TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [QUESS] Quess Corp FY26 EBITDA Up 19% YoY at ₹312 Cr; Dividend ₹6/Share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Quess Corp Ltd announced its Q4 and FY26 financial results, reporting a 19% YoY increase in EBITDA to ₹312 crore for FY26. Revenue for FY26 stood at ₹15,305 crore, up by 2% YoY. The Board declared a special interim dividend of ₹3 per share and recommended a final dividend of ₹3 per share. CEO Lohit Bhatia highlighted strong performance in Professional Staffing and Overseas Business as key drivers of EBITDA growth.

  • FY26 Revenue at ₹15,305 cr, up 2% YoY; EBITDA at ₹312 cr, up 19% YoY.
  • Q4 FY26 Revenue at ₹3,892 cr, up 6% YoY; EBITDA at ₹86 cr, up 28% YoY.
  • Board announces total dividend of ₹6 per share.
  • Professional Staffing EBITDA grew 43% YoY with approximately 12% margin.
  • Overseas Business EBITDA grew 21% YoY, driven by UAE, Malaysia, and the Philippines.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quess Corp Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RANEHOLDIN] Rane Steering Systems Gets Stay Order on Income Tax Penalty
item.description:
Rane Holdings Ltd reports that its wholly-owned subsidiary, Rane Steering Systems Private Limited (RSSL), received a stay order from the Hon’ble High Court of Madras. The order sets aside the penalty levied by the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department for Assessment Year 2015-16 (Financial Year 2014-15) and remits the case back to the AU for fresh assessment after considering the Denovo order from Commissioner of Income Tax (Appeals). The company had previously received a penalty of ₹3.63 Crores. No financial implications are expected.

  • RSSL received a stay order from the Madras High Court regarding an income tax penalty.
  • The High Court set aside the order from the Assessment Unit of the Income Tax Department.
  • The case has been remitted back to the Assessment Unit for reassessment.
  • The original penalty levied was ₹3.63 Crores for the Assessment Year 2015-16.
  • No financial implications are expected on Rane Holdings Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RANE HOLDINGS LTD. | Category: Legal

item.title: [ACMESOLAR] ACME Solar: Appeal Admitted in ₹7.82 Cr Claims Case
item.description:
ACME Solar Holdings Ltd's subsidiary, ACME Aklera Power Technology Private Limited, filed an appeal with the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity challenging disallowed claims of approximately ₹7.82 crores related to Basic Customs Duty and GST by the Rajasthan Electricity Regulatory Commission. The appeal was admitted for further hearing on April 29, 2026, and received on May 4, 2026.

  • ACME Aklera Power Technology filed an appeal against disallowed claims of ₹7.82 Cr.
  • The appeal challenges an order by the Rajasthan Electricity Regulatory Commission.
  • The Appellate Tribunal for Electricity admitted the appeal on April 29, 2026.
  • The disallowed claims relate to Basic Customs Duty and GST.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ACME Solar Holdings Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [QUESS] Quess Corp: FY26 Results, ₹3 Dividend & Director Changes
item.description:
Quess Corp Ltd's board approved the audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026, with a modified opinion from auditors Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP. A special interim dividend of ₹3 per share (30%) was declared for FY26, with a record date of May 08, 2026, and payment on or before May 21, 2026. A final dividend of ₹3 per share is recommended, subject to shareholder approval. Anish Thurthi was appointed as an Additional Director, while Chandran Ratnaswami resigned. KFin Technologies Limited replaces MUFG Intime India Private Limited as the Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents.

  • Audited FY26 results approved with a modified opinion from Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP.
  • Special interim dividend of ₹3 per share declared, record date May 08, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹3 per share recommended, pending shareholder approval.
  • Anish Thurthi appointed as Additional Director, effective June 01, 2026.
  • Chandran Ratnaswami resigned as Non-Executive Director, effective May 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quess Corp Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [QUESS] Quess Corp Approves Results, ₹3 Dividend, Director Changes
item.description:
Quess Corp Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, along with a modified opinion from auditors Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP. A special interim dividend of ₹3 per share (30%) was declared, with a record date of May 08, 2026, and payment on or before May 21, 2026. A final dividend of ₹3 per share is recommended, subject to shareholder approval. Anish Thurthi was appointed as an Additional Director, and Chandran Ratnaswami resigned as a Non-Executive Director. KFin Technologies Limited replaces MUFG Intime India Private Limited as the Registrar to an Issue and Share Transfer Agents.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with a modified opinion from Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP.
  • Special interim dividend of ₹3 per share (30%) declared, record date set for May 08, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹3 per share recommended, pending shareholder approval at the AGM.
  • Anish Thurthi appointed as an Additional Non-Executive, Non-Independent Director.
  • Chandran Ratnaswami resigned as Non-Executive Director, effective May 31, 2026.
  • KFin Technologies Limited appointed as the new Registrar and Share Transfer Agent.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quess Corp Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
